beats.text: In Amber Acorn Village, Friendly Dragon skipped across the mossy green, wishing for one thing: friends to share a picnic on the soft grass.
Orange Cat padded over with a picnic basket, but a gust tumbled all the acorn muffins rolling down the winding, bumpy path!
White Cat pounced in, and together Friendly Dragon puffed warm air, Orange Cat scooped, White Cat caught, and they munched every muffin, giggling.
